title: Cif Professional All Purpose Cleaner Lemon 5L
features: At Cif, we believe in hygiene and sparkling results That’s why for over 50 years, Cif has been developing a range of cleaning products that remove grease and grime, without damage – providing you with a hygienic shine for professional kitchens, washrooms and floors
This all purpose product is made to quickly remove dirt, grime and grease and features a fresh Lemon scent
The cleaner also features a no-rinse formula that allows you to clean floors and leave to rapidly dry - saving you time whilst also reducing the risk of slips or falls

Cif Professional All-Purpose Cleaner can be used for unpolished floors, walls, paintwork, ceramics, laminates, plastics and washable hard surfaces whilst leaving a pleasant fragrance that keeps your surfaces smelling as fresh as they look
Package Contains : 1 x Cif Pro Formula Professional All Purpose Lemon Cleaner Concentrate 5Ltr
